tools.title: sansan0/TrendRadar
tools.description: ⭐AI-driven public opinion & trend monitor with multi-platform aggregation, RSS, and smart alerts.🎯 告别信息过载，你的 AI 舆情监控助手与热点筛选工具！聚合多平台热点 + RSS 订阅，支持关键词精准筛选。AI 智能筛选新闻 + AI 翻译 + AI 分析简报直推手机，也支持接入 MCP 架构，赋能 AI 自然语言对话分析、情感洞察与趋势预测等。支持 Docker ，数据本地/云端自持。集成微信/飞书/钉钉/Telegram/邮件/ntfy/bark/slack 等渠道智能推送。

百度联盟发布“星云计划”，全面开放百度猎户座AI引擎
china.description: 36氪获悉，4月22日，百度联盟大会上正式启动“星云计划”，向全行业开放百度猎户座AI引擎。MCP服务收益与开发者共享，厂商可按行业模块化直接接入。小米、荣耀、vivo等手机厂商已率先加入。百度猎户座是面向合作伙伴开放的AI搜索全链路通用服务方案，依托文心助手，通过Master Agent与多Skills编排，可调用百度搜索及电商、旅游、健康等服务，实现从信息获取到任务交付的闭环。

china.title: 押注AAV体内CAR-T，「西湖云谷智药」即将启动IIT研究
china.description:
文｜胡香赟
编辑｜海若镜
近期，万亿市值“药王”礼来斥资24亿美元（超160亿人民币）完成的一笔收购，将医药行业的目光重新吸引回细胞与基因治疗（CGT）领域。
被收购企业Orna Therapeutics主要从事环状RNA研究，核心药物是一款靶向CD19的体内CAR-T，即将步入临床试验阶段。相较动辄百万元一针的传统CAR-T，体内CAR-T是一种有潜力实现“物美价廉”的细胞疗法。有从业者认为，如

Abstract: Current large language models reason in isolation. Although it is common to sample multiple reasoning paths in parallel, these trajectories do not interact, and often fail in the same redundant ways. We introduce LACE, a framework that transforms reas
papers.author: Yang Li, Zirui Zhang, Yang Liu, Chengzhi Mao

Abstract: Deliberative multi-agent systems allow agents to exchange messages and revise beliefs over time. While this interaction is meant to improve performance, it can also create dangerous conformity effects: agreement, confidence, prestige, or majority size

papers.author: Jacob Dang, Brian Y. Xie, Omar G. Younis

Abstract: This position paper argues that large language model (LLM) reasoning should be studied as latent-state trajectory formation rather than as faithful surface chain-of-thought (CoT). This matters because claims about faithfulness, interpretability, reaso
papers.author: Wenshuo Wang

papers.title: Structured Abductive-Deductive-Inductive Reasoning for LLMs via Algebraic Invariants
papers.description:
